subtitle: Master the Art of Building Scalable, Real-Time Web Applications from Scratch.
overview: Stop learning outdated theories. This course is a 100% project-based deep dive into the modern web ecosystem. You will start with the fundamentals of structure and style and end by deploying a live, database-driven application using Google Firebase.
outcomes: Build a Premium Personal Portfolio with Tailwind
Develop a Real-Time Task Manager with Firestore
Create a Secure Member Dashboard with Auth
Deploy a live database-driven web application

projects.title: A Premium Personal Portfolio
projects.description: Built with Tailwind CSS and hosted on Firebase.

projects.title: A Real-Time Task Manager
projects.description: A JS-driven app using Firebase Firestore for instant data syncing.

projects.title: Secure Member Dashboard
projects.description: A full-stack app featuring User Authentication (Login/Signup) via Firebase Auth.

whyJoin.title: Industry-Grade Mentorship
whyJoin.description: Learn directly from Dimuth Adithya, a Full-Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience.

whyJoin.title: 1:1 Code Reviews
whyJoin.description: We don't just look at your results; we review your code line-by-line to ensure you're writing clean, professional scripts.

whyJoin.title: Zero-Fluff Curriculum
whyJoin.description: We skip the focus on boring history and go straight to what the industry actually uses in 2026.

whyJoin.title: Hiring Preparation
whyJoin.description: Access to mock interviews, LinkedIn optimization, and resume reviews tailored for the Sri Lankan and Global tech markets.

whoIsThisFor: SLIATE & University Students looking to ace their web projects and exams.
Beginners who want a structured path into the IT industry.
Designers who want to learn how to turn their Figma files into functional code.

logistics.location: Online (with physical support available in Kegalle)
